title: DomainPackManifest V1
description: Manifest file for a domain pack. Describes the pack's integrity checks, RDI scoring configuration, reproducibility settings, and strategy extensions for a specific research domain.

pack_id.description: Unique identifier for this domain pack (e.g., 'cond-mat-integrity').

domain.description: Research domain this pack applies to (e.g., 'hep-th', 'cond-mat', 'mathematics'). Must match ResearchStrategy.domain and IntegrityReport.domain.

description.description: Description of what this pack checks.

entry_point.description: Module path or function name for loading the check implementation.

sub_checks.description: Sub-checks within this check (e.g., cross_check has ward_identity, gauge_invariance, etc.).

checks.description: List of integrity checks provided by this pack.

tools.description: MCP tools required by checks in this pack.

npm_packages.description: npm package dependencies with version ranges.

dependencies.description: External dependencies needed by this pack.

integrity_framework_version.description: Minimum integrity framework version required (SemVer range).

rep_sdk_version.description: Minimum REP SDK version required (SemVer range).

scoring_config.description: RDI scoring configuration: method taxonomy for generality, problem taxonomy for significance, and reference values. If omitted, REP SDK uses built-in defaults (method_class fallback 0.5, significance fallback 0.5).

method_taxonomy.description: Maps method approach strings to generality scores (0-1). Example: { 'lattice_qcd': 0.90, 'fixed_order_pqcd': 0.70 }.

problem_taxonomy.description: Problem significance classification for the significance RDI dimension.

reference_metric_count.description: Normalization denominator for result_breadth in generality scoring.

reference_assumption_count.description: Normalization denominator for assumption_lightness in generality scoring.

rdi_weight_overrides.description: Optional RDI weight overrides. Must sum to 1.0 (enforced by SDK runtime validator; not expressible in JSON Schema alone). Values outside allowed bounds are rejected at validation time.

literature_service_id.description: External literature service for novelty scoring. Known values: 'inspire' (HEP), 'crossref' (general academic), 'openalex' (general academic), 'semantic_scholar', 'zbmath' (mathematics). If omitted, novelty uses local corpus only.

taxonomy_expansion.description: Automatic taxonomy expansion configuration. When enabled, taxonomy_miss diagnostics are accumulated and new entries are proposed (and optionally auto-approved) to grow method_taxonomy and problem_taxonomy over time. Default: disabled.

enabled.description: Whether automatic taxonomy expansion is active.

min_miss_count.description: Minimum distinct taxonomy_miss events with a common pattern before a proposal is generated.

auto_approve_threshold.description: Confidence threshold at or above which proposals are auto-committed without human review.

require_human_review.description: When true, all proposals require explicit human approval regardless of confidence score.

max_pending_proposals.description: Maximum number of pending (unapproved) proposals retained. Oldest proposals are discarded when exceeded.

fingerprint_config.description: Novelty scoring configuration: fingerprint vector construction and literature record extraction adapters. If omitted, REP SDK uses the default 96-dim fingerprint with title-only fallback for external records (see EVO-17 Section 4.3.1).

method_vectors.description: Pre-computed method embedding vectors (maps method approach to fixed-length vector).

observable_vocabulary.description: Vocabulary of observable types for one-hot encoding in fingerprint. Also used by result_breadth to deduplicate metric keys into distinct observable classes.

literature_record_adapter.description: Adapter specification for extracting fingerprint components from LiteratureRecord.metadata. Maps service-specific metadata fields to the 96-dim fingerprint components.

method_field.description: Metadata field name containing the method/approach (mapped to method_embedding). Example: 'arxiv_categories' for INSPIRE.

result_type_field.description: Metadata field name containing result type info (mapped to result_type_encoding). Example: 'keywords' for CrossRef.

param_range_field.description: Metadata field name containing parameter range info. Example: 'custom_metadata.energy_range' for INSPIRE.

headline_field.description: Metadata field name containing headline results. Example: 'abstract' for CrossRef (text extraction).

reproducibility_config.description: Reproducibility verification configuration: computation backends and verification modes for the domain.

verification_mode.description: How to verify reproducibility. Recommended values: 'exact_match', 'statistical', 'formal_proof_check', 'not_applicable'.

backends.description: Available computation backends for reproducibility verification.

strategy_extensions.description: Domain-specific strategy field constraints. Defines which additional fields the domain expects in ResearchStrategy.method (via additionalProperties) and their validation rules.

method_fields.description: Additional method fields expected by this domain. Example (HEP): { 'order': { type: 'string', recommended_values: ['LO', 'NLO', 'NNLO'] }, 'gauge': { type: 'string' }, 'renormalization_scheme': { type: 'string' } }.
